content.en:
Rumble!!!!

The twentieth thunder tribulation has come, and this time it appears in the image of the god of thunder and war.

However, compared with the nineteenth thunder tribulation, the power of the twentieth thunder tribulation has nearly doubled, even if the son of the middle era is facing the full force of this twentieth thunder tribulation, it is estimated that he will be hit hard, and without some life-saving treasures or hole cards, he can't get through it at all.

But for Ye Tian, this thunder tribulation is still not enough to see.

"Die!"

Ye Tian held the Hellish Divine Sky Spear and threw it fiercely towards the Thunder God of War, instantly piercing through the other party and annihilating the thunder rules on the other party.

The twentieth thunderstorm was passed.

"Only the last thunderstorm is left!"

Ye Tian said lightly.

As long as he survives the last thunder tribulation, he will be equivalent to surviving the thunder tribulation of the Domination Realm and officially become a real Domination-level powerhouse.

Soon, the twenty-first thunderstorm struck.

This time, Ye Tian did not choose to attack, because he knew very well that with his combat strength, the twenty-first thunder tribulation still had no effect on him, and he could annihilate the other party in an instant.

Therefore, he wanted to test the defensive effect of his Chaos Origin Ancient Well.

Rumble!!!!

The power of the Chaos Avenue descended and turned into the Great Dao Vision—the Chaos Origin Ancient Well of the Origin Realm, and the fragments of the Origin Well attached to it were lifelike, as if they were the reincarnation of the true Origin Well.

The next moment, the Thunder God of War transformed into the Twenty-first Thunder Tribulation rushed over and launched a desperate blow to bombard Ye Tian's Chaos Origin Ancient Well.

However, the Chaos Origin Gu Jing only trembled a little, and the Thunder God of War collapsed.

"This thunder god of war's full force blow and comparable to the weaker Tianzun's full force blow, some powerful sons of the era use some life-saving hole cards or forbidden arts, they will not be killed, they should be able to survive. However, there are also a few of those sons of the Twelve Universe Era who are against the sky, and I am afraid that less than thirty percent of them can really survive the Domination-level Thunder Tribulation!"

Ye Tian judged.

The thunderstorm ended, and the thunderstorm cloud dissipated.

Ye Tian sat cross-legged and continued to stabilize his foundation.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian's cultivation to be completely stabilized at the first order of domination.

"It's time to go back!"

Ye Tian took a spaceship, shuttled back to the Holy City, and then went on retreat.

With his talent, there is no bottleneck from the Dominating First Order to the Ninth Order Peak, and as long as the resources are sufficient, he can soon reach the peak of the Dominating Ninth Order.

Therefore, Ye Tian naturally did not waste time, and he wanted to raise his cultivation to the peak of the Ninth Order of Domination as soon as possible, that is, the Ultimate Domination.

The gap between the first order of domination and the ninth order of domination is very large, once the cultivation is improved, Ye Tian's combat power is off the charts!

Besides, he still has a lot to improve, and he can't afford to waste time in the next few days.

At the same time, the news of Ye Tian's breakthrough to the master was gradually passed out.

And with Ye Tian's breakthrough, the prestige of Tiange naturally rose higher and higher, although it was not yet able to match the old dominant-level forces, but it was enough to be on an equal footing with ordinary dominant-level forces.

Moreover, in terms of high-end power, Tiange made other dominant-level forces desperate.

After all, one Ye Tian alone was enough to sweep the Domination level, and no Domination level could be comparable to Ye Tian.

And the more curious people are calculating Ye Tian's combat strength and comparing Ye Tian with Tianzun.

Some people think that Ye Tian can fight with Tianzun, but some people think that the gap between the master and Tianzun is too big, and everyone who can become Tianzun is the true genius of the human race, and it will take some time for Ye Tian to fight beyond the level.

However, the upper echelons of the Terran race had a deeper understanding of Ye Tian's combat power.

Kungo Temple.

Kunwu Supreme had just returned from the Abyss of Destruction, and when he heard the news that Ye Tian had been promoted to Domination, he muttered: "Ye Tian is at the level of the Universe God, he has surpassed the combat power of the top master, second only to the weaker Tianzun, and now he has broken through to the realm of masterdom, it will not be long before he will be promoted to the extreme of the master, and if he improves some more secret techniques and exercises, his combat power will definitely be comparable to that of the top Tianzun, and he may be able to impact the supreme-level combat power!"

This is his biggest evaluation of Ye Tian!

In history, there are still those who are comparable to the Heavenly Venerable, but there is no one who is comparable to the Supreme.

But Ye Tian's talent is too rebellious, so Kunwu Supreme has such an idea.

Holy City, Heavenly Pavilion.

It took Ye Tian decades and the time to accelerate the time to elevate his cultivation to the ultimate in domination, and he was steadily improving, and the foundation of each small level was extremely solid.

After that, he began to cultivate the Eighteen Golden Body Technique.

The secret technique of the Eighteen Golden Body Recipes is very easy to use, and it is not uncommon for the inheritance of the Twelve Universe Era to surpass the Eighteen Golden Body Formulas, but Ye Tian's current physique is more in line with the Eighteen Golden Body Formulas, and the foundation has been set, so naturally it will not be easily changed.

Moreover, his real hole card is the Chaos Golden Desolation Formula, and the Eighteen Golden Body Recipe is just a foil, so it doesn't matter if he changes it or not.

In the time-accelerated environment, he spent decades cultivating the fifteenth and sixteenth sets of movements of the Eighteen Golden Body Techniques one by one, raising his physical body to an extremely terrifying level, and then continued to improve the eighth layer of the Chaos Golden Desolation Technique.

However, the eighth layer of the Chaos Golden Desolation Technique was extremely difficult to cultivate, and even if there were those resources from the Origin Realm, it would not be possible to raise the eighth layer of the Chaos Golden Desolation Technique to an extremely high level for a while.

As a result, Ye Tian focused his cultivation on other aspects, such as the Sword Dao Peerless Technique, the Chaos True Technique, the Fifth Form of the Tiangang Battle Method, and the Chaos Dao Realm.

As for the supernatural powers, Ye Tian is now at a limit.

He has now cultivated the time and space powers to the consummation realm, although he can still cultivate more time and space powers, but there is no essential improvement in his own strength.

Unless he can comprehend a higher-level supernatural power, but there is no higher-level supernatural power in the universe, and the great supernatural power is the limit.

"There may be a higher level of supernatural power above the great supernatural power, but there is no one in the universe, but the supernatural power can be fused to create a stronger supernatural power, my time talent and space talent have been fused, if I can create the great supernatural power of time and space, the power is absolutely very powerful, but this step is too difficult! If you combine the twelve talents, fuse them into the chaos talent, and create the chaos supernatural power, the strength will be transformed, but this step is more difficult, I'm afraid I will try it after I become a transcendent!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

He doesn't want to be ambitious, and that will only slow him down.

"That Immortal Lin Flower from the Origin Realm, I should be qualified to take it now!"

Ye Tian thought.
